topic: Omega-3 vs Omega-6: the inflammation ratio nobody talks about
caption:
Did you know your diet could be silently fueling inflammation in your body? 🤯 It's not just about 'eating healthy,' but understanding the crucial balance between Omega-3 and Omega-6 fatty acids. Most modern diets are heavily skewed towards Omega-6, creating an inflammatory environment that impacts everything from your joints to your brain. 🧠 This imbalance is a silent driver of chronic disease that very few people are aware of. Learning to rebalance this ratio can be a game-changer for your health. Swipe to discover why this ratio is so important and how to fix it! ✨

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to understand silent inflammation. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — balanced fats lead to a healthier you! 💪
